metadata.title:
PLAN TO SHIP FREE


SPEECH MEN AWAY

pages.raw_text:
That the mayor and other city
officials have co-operated with rep
resentatives of the Northern Pa
cific railroad in scheme to rid
Spokane of all her idle working
men during the |. w. w. troubles
with the police, in order to weaken
the support of the revoIutionists, is
an assertion made by |. W. w. lead.
ers. One prominent representative
of the !. w. w. declared last night
that approximately 5000 men had
been shipped out Of Spokane by the
Northern Pacific Railroad Co., at
the solicitation of Mayor N. s. Pratt
and others, during the last three
weeks.


III such statements are true, the
work has evidently had at least a
part of its intended effect, for at
the present time there are com
paratively few idle workingmen in
Spokane, as compared with the
NUMBERS of penniless creatures
who have thronged the~city at this
season in previous years. Accord
ing to reports being circulated by
those interested in the /. w. w.
fight, the Northern Pacific has
been securing the majority of its
men, wanted on works all through
